_meta.description: Human-ranked ideal ordering of static_listings.json entries for a given preference. Used by eval_reducer.py and eval_end_to_end.py to measure ranking alignment (Kendall tau or top-1 accuracy) between predicted order and this gold ranking. Listings not in a preference's ranked list are either disqualified or deemed irrelevant for that preference.

ranking_rationale_per_pref.pref_001: SF 2BR under $3000, cat, commute to Salesforce Tower. Rank by commute quality + pet-friendliness + unit quality.
ranking_rationale_per_pref.pref_005: Chicago 2BR, Wicker Park/Logan Square preferred, walkable to Blue Line trade-off, 2 cats, natural light/high ceilings.
ranking_rationale_per_pref.pref_006: Oakland 1BR under $2100, grad student with cat, close to BART, likes bars/coffee.
ranking_rationale_per_pref.pref_008: Oakland 2BR under $2500, works from home with dog, multi-destination commute (Berkeley + Downtown Oakland), natural light priority.
ranking_rationale_per_pref.pref_010: SF 2BR stretch to $3100 for views/modern, dog, commute to UCSF Mission Bay, quiet + walkable + near park.

rankings.rationale: SL001 best: 8min walk, modern, pet-ok, $2750. SL003 second: 12min walk, spacious, pet-ok, $2950. SL005 third: 18min Muni, views, $2850. SL009 Noe Valley pet-ok but 25min. SL002 Mission, cheap but 22min commute. SL004 no-pets. SL008 studio (wrong bedrooms).

SL021 Wicker Park walk to Blue Line, modern, light, $2300 — best. SL022 Logan Square, non-smoking hint, hardwood, high ceilings, $2150 — strong. SL026 Bucktown, modern, rooftop, $2450. SL024 Lincoln Park $2900 over budget even with trade-off max $2700.
SL011 Temescal best: 14min BART, bars+coffee adjacent, pet-ok, $1950. SL013 Adams Point: lake+walkable, $1650. SL016 Grand Lake, renovated, $2100. SL019 Jack London, waterfront, $2050. SL015 no-pets.

SL012 Rockridge: 10min Berkeley BART + 12min Downtown Oakland, bright, pet-ok, $2400. SL014 Piedmont Ave: bright, 12min bus Berkeley, pet-ok, $2250. SL017 Uptown: 15min Berkeley + 2min walk Downtown, but low natural light. SL020 Temescal: 13min Berkeley, spacious yard, $2350. SL018 Montclair $2900 over budget.

SL005 Potrero Hill: Bay views, modern finishes, 8min walk to UCSF Mission Bay, $2850 — matches trade-off for view/modern. SL003 SoMa modern but dark. SL001 South Beach modern, Salesforce-centric not UCSF. SL004 no-pets, SL008 studio.
